content: Cognee V2 API (all async, require await): remember(data, dataset_name='main_dataset', ...) -> RememberResult; recall(query_text, datasets=None, ...) -> ...; improve() -> ...; forget(dataset='name') -> ... . V1 pipeline: add(data, dataset_name='main_dataset', ...) -> PipelineRunInfo; cognify(datasets=None, ...) -> dict|list[PipelineRunInfo]; search(query_text, query_type=SearchType.GRAPH_COMPLETION, datasets=None, ...) -> List[SearchResult]. Prune: cognee.prune.prune_data() wipes raw files; cognee.prune.prune_system(graph=True, vector=True, metadata=False, cache=True) wipes databases. For surgical per-dataset: forget(dataset='name') or cognee.datasets.empty_dataset(dataset_id). All import from 'import cognee'.
